description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet. Product Details Has two main compartments, three card slots, a zippered pocket in the centre, four insert pockets and an id card holder Has a buttoned pocket on the right side to carry coinsBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and Care Genuine leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 9.5 cm x 11.5 cm
